kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Matilda goes with at most one of Blacksmith, Southgate, and 9 coins.
More members of the Joiners' Guild are in the Market Ward than members of the Clothiers' Guild.
The artisan in Southgate's levy is lower than both Cedric and the Blacksmith.
Millpond goes with exactly one of Cedric, Matilda, or Rowan.
Weaver goes with either Godfrey or Wulfric.
Cooper, Millpond, and 8 coins go with Godfrey, Rowan, and Wulfric, in some order.
7 coins goes with exactly two of Cedric, Weaver, and Kingsford.
At least two members of the Ironmongers' Guild are in the South Side.
Exactly one of Cedric, the Cooper, the Tanner, and the artisan with 5 coins belongs to the North Side.
Either Godfrey goes with 4 coins or someone in the Hill Ward goes with Potter (but not both).
Exactly one of these is true: Potter goes with Eastcheap; Tanner goes with 9 coins; Millpond goes with 5 coins.
Blacksmith, Mason, and Tanner go with Bridgegate, 6 coins, and 7 coins, in some order.
